mapper.sql: tracking_id, project_id, project_name, tracking_period, tracking_year, revenue, net_profit, net_asset, debt_ratio, growth_rate, risk_level, risk_note, report_content, attachments, tracking_status, tracker_id, tracker_name, tracking_date, del_flag, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, remark
mapper.select: SELECT FROM post_invest_tracking WHERE tracking_id = #{trackingId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.update:
UPDATE post_invest_tracking
project_id = #{projectId}, project_name = #{projectName}, tracking_period = #{trackingPeriod}, tracking_year = #{trackingYear}, revenue = #{revenue}, net_profit = #{netProfit}, net_asset = #{netAsset}, debt_ratio = #{debtRatio}, growth_rate = #{growthRate}, risk_level = #{riskLevel}, risk_note = #{riskNote}, report_content = #{reportContent}, attachments = #{attachments}, tracking_status = #{trackingStatus}, tracker_id = #{trackerId}, tracker_name = #{trackerName}, tracking_date = #{trackingDate}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = #{updateTime},
WHERE tracking_id = #{trackingId} AND del_flag = '0'
mapper.delete:
UPDATE post_invest_tracking SET del_flag = '2' WHERE tracking_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM post_invest_tracking WHERE project_id = #{projectId} AND del_flag = '0' ORDER BY tracking_year DESC, tracking_period DESC
